attributes.name: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] High pending request queue

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.requests.pending))
    BY attributes.server
// Sustained pending requests indicate the thread pool cannot keep up with demand
// Adjust threshold based on expected queue depth under normal load
| WHERE pending > 10
| SORT pending DESC
